single_model_recommendations.why: Offers strong reasoning capabilities, large context window, and fast response times suitable for enterprise-scale knowledge assistance.
single_model_recommendations.tradeoffs: Higher cost compared to budget options; may require optimization for large-scale usage.

single_model_recommendations.why: Provides adequate performance for structured outputs and long-context processing at a lower cost.
single_model_recommendations.tradeoffs: Limited reasoning depth and slower response times compared to premium options.

single_model_recommendations.why: Exceptional reasoning capabilities, optimized for tool calling and structured outputs, with a large context window.
single_model_recommendations.tradeoffs: Significantly higher cost; may exceed budget constraints for enterprise-scale usage.

roles.reason: Optimized for retrieval tasks with support for large-scale document indexing and fast query resolution.
Handles reasoning, summarization, and structured output generation effectively for enterprise knowledge assistance.

optimisation_tips.title: Implement prompt caching
optimisation_tips.detail: Cache frequently used prompts and responses to reduce token usage and improve response times for repeated queries.

optimisation_tips.title: Optimize retrieval pipeline
optimisation_tips.detail: Use a high-performance retriever model to minimize latency and improve document indexing efficiency.

optimisation_tips.title: Reduce context size
optimisation_tips.detail: Analyze user queries to identify opportunities for reducing the required context window, thereby lowering token usage.

confidence.reason: The requirements are clearly defined, and the available models provide suitable options for the specified use case.
assumptions: Each user makes an average of 10 requests per day.
Large context size corresponds to 25,000 input tokens per request.
Structured outputs and reasoning tasks require 1200 output tokens and 2000 reasoning tokens per request.
Caching is applicable due to repeated queries and document retrieval.
